zh.Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, German: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根
zh.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder於大約1555年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根。他於1582年與Ottilia在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年5月在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, German: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder于大约1555年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根。他于1582年与Ottilia在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟海瑟阿爾澤斯普倫德林根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1614年5月在他的家乡享年60岁。

en.Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, German: Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Grand Duchy of Hesse

nameMeanings.name: Baeder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bader
meanings: German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Bäder): occupational name for an attendant in or owner of a public bath house, from an agent derivative of Middle High German bat ‘bath’ (Old High German bad), modern German Bad. In former times, such attendants undertook a variety of functions, including blood-letting, tooth-pulling, shaving, and hair-cutting. The surname of German origin is also found in Hungary, where it is mostly spelled Báder, and in France (Alsace).
Arabic: variant of   Badr  . Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians.

nameMeanings.name: Wendel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the folk name for a Wend, a member of a Slavic people living in the area between the Elbe and the Oder, who were overrun by Germanic migrants in the 12th century.  St Wendel  was a 6th- or 7th-century shepherd and confessor, who is venerated especially at Sanktwendel on the River Nahe.

en.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder was born about 1555, in Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Grand Duchy of Hesse. He married Ottilia in 1582, in Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Grand Duchy of Hesse. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in May 1614, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder est né environ 1555, à Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Il a épousé Ottilia en 1582, à Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en mai 1614, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder wurde um 1555 in Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen geboren. Er hat 1582 in Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen Ottilia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Mai 1614 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder è nato il circa 1555 nel Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Lui sposato Ottilia nel 1582, nel Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel maggio 1614, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, German: グロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンルヘインヘセンアルズエイスプレンドリンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Wendel Baederは約1555年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンルヘインヘセンアルズエイスプレンドリンジェンで生まれた。1582年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンルヘインヘセンアルズエイスプレンドリンジェンでOttiliaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1614年5月に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder(은)는 대략 1555년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 리인헤센 알즈이 스프렌들링에서 태어났다. 그는 1582년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 리인헤센 알즈이 스프렌들링에서 Ottilia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 5월 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder nasceu aproximadamente 1555, em Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ele casou-se com Ottilia em 1582, em Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em maio de 1614, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder родился около 1555 г. в местности спрендлинген, алзи, раинессен, гроssхирзогтум хессен. Он женился на женщине по имени Ottilia в 1582 г. в местности спрендлинген, алзи, раинессен, гроssхирзогтум хессен. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер май 1614 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Wendel Baeder nació aproximadamente 1555, en Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Se casó con Ottilia en 1582, en Sprendlingen, Alzey, Rheinhessen, Großherzogtum Hessen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en mayo de 1614, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
